get.description: Retrieves assignments for the current user (as teacher or student)

post.description: Creates a new assignment in a course (teacher only)

get.description: Retrieves a single assignment by its ID with included tasks
get.summary: Get assignment by ID with tasks

get.description: Retrieves statistics for an assignment (teacher only)

post.description: Adds an existing task to an assignment (teacher only)

400.description: Bad request (task not in course, already added)

delete.description: Removes a task from an assignment (teacher only)

get.description: Retrieves all attempts submitted by the authenticated user for a given task.
get.summary: List user’s attempts for a specific task

400.description: Bad request (e.g., missing or invalid taskId)

post.description: Submits a new code attempt for execution against a task’s test cases.

400.description: Bad request (e.g., still running or invalid input)

post.description: Authenticates a user with email/username and password and returns a JWT upon success.
Registers a new user with a username, email, and password.

201.description: User registered successfully (sensitive data omitted)" // Adjust response type based on actual return

400.description: Bad request (e.g., invalid input, user already exists)

get.description: Retrieves courses for the current user (as teacher or student)

post.description: Enrolls the current user in a course using join code
post.summary: Enroll in a course using join code

400.description: Already enrolled or invalid join code

get.description: Retrieves a single course by its ID

post.description: Enrolls the current user in a course (requires teacher permission?)

delete.description: Removes the current user from a course

get.description: Lists all students enrolled in a course (teacher only)
Retrieves grades based on filters (teacher sees all, students see own)

post.description: Creates or updates a grade for a student's task in an assignment (teacher only)

404.description: Assignment, task, or student not found

get.description: Retrieves statistics for an assignment (teacher only)

delete.description: Deletes a grade by ID (teacher only)

get.description: Retrieves a list of tasks based on optional filters.

post.description: Creates a new task with the provided details.

400.description: Bad request (e.g., invalid input, topic not found)

get.description: Retrieves a single task by its ID.

put.description: Updates an existing task's details by ID.

post.description: Creates a new test case for a task
Uploads input/output file for a test case

get.description: Retrieves a list of tasks based on optional filters.

post.description: Adds new topic by its alias

time.description: Time zone will be ignored when encoding to PostgreSQL.
